title: Ubiquiti UNVR-Pro - UniFi Protect Network Video Recorder Pro
category: Cameras, security / IP NVR Recorders / UniFi Video
description: The UNVR-Pro Camera Network Recorder is a 2U Rackmount NVR device from Ubiquiti with pre-installed UniFi Protect for recording UVC cameras. The NVR has the power to record up to 60 cameras in FullHD resolution or 20 cameras in 4k resolution and keep the recordings up to 60 days. NVR supports up to 7 HDD bays for SSD/HDD with maximum capacity 16TB/disk , supports RAID 1 / 5 / 10 for higher reliability of data storage, has 3" touchscreen , which in a later version will also allow video preview,… The NVR can be accessed classically via a browser from a desktop, laptop, but also a tablet or mobile phone thanks to a mobile application for iOS or Android (7) 2.5"/3.5" HDD bays (1) 10G SFP+ port (1) Gigabit Ethernet RJ45 port 2U-sized, rack-mountable console (kit Included) 3" touchscreen with video event previewing (will be included in a future console update) Pre-installed UniFi Protect application Simple, Bluetooth-powered setup via the UniFi Protect mobile app Automated RAID 1, 5, or 10 HDD configuration Redundant power supply - 230 V or it can be connected to the USP RPS (sold separately) for enhanced power supply failover protection UniFi SmartPower Managed with the UniFi Protect application: Version 1.4.3 or later (iOS) or 1.3.9 or later (Android) Device Power cord Rack mounting screws 19" rack mounts
specsSearch: Image Max. recording resolution 8MP Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen, Bluetooth Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 160 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 2 Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [g] 9200 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 87 Depth [mm] 325 Hardware Number of supported IP cameras 60 Number of supported HDD 7 Supported HDD capacity [TB] 16
